author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Result: committed a3582686 on fix/728-smoke-verify-auth-and-ghcr-public. Single workflow file edit (+13 lines). Adds docker/login-action@v3 step to smoke-verify before the docker pull, mirroring publish-image's login. Inline comment explains WHY (GHCR private-by-default) so it doesn't get deleted as 'redundant' once the package is public. Commit signed. Ready for user to push and PR to develop. IMPORTANT separate manual step: the package itself is still private (CI fix doesn't change that — only fixes the workflow's ability to verify itself). User-facing pull from outside the repo's auth scope still fails until an admin flips package visibility to public.
